articles.title: Welcome Guide
articles.question: How do I get started with the platform?
articles.answer_text: Welcome! Getting started is easy: Create your account, complete the setup wizard, choose a template or start blank, and publish your first content. The whole process takes about 5 minutes. Our AI assistant can guide you through any step.

articles.title: Account Setup
articles.question: How should I set up my account?
articles.answer_text: Complete your profile in Settings → Profile: add name, avatar, and bio. Enable two-factor authentication for security. Configure notifications. Connect integrations you need. Set timezone and language preferences.

articles.title: Dashboard Navigation
articles.question: How do I navigate the dashboard?
articles.answer_text: The sidebar contains main sections: Content, Media, Settings, Analytics. Use Cmd/Ctrl+K for quick search. The top bar shows notifications and your profile. Customize dashboard widgets to show metrics you care about.

articles.title: Pricing Overview
articles.question: What are the pricing options?
articles.answer_text: Three plans: Free (3 projects, basic features), Professional ($29/mo, unlimited projects, priority support), Enterprise (custom, SSO, SLA). All paid plans include 14-day trial. Annual billing saves 20%.

articles.title: Managing Subscription
articles.question: How do I manage my subscription?
articles.answer_text: Go to Settings → Billing to: view current plan, change plans (upgrade/downgrade), update payment method, download invoices, set billing alerts, and manage team seats.

articles.title: Cancellation
articles.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
articles.answer_text: Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan. Access continues until billing period ends. Data retained 30 days. Export your data first if needed. You can reactivate anytime.

articles.title: Content Editor
articles.question: How do I create and edit content?
articles.answer_text: Use the block-based editor: click + to add blocks (text, images, video, etc). Drag blocks to reorder. Use / commands for quick insertion. Content auto-saves. Preview before publishing. Keyboard shortcuts available (press ? to see all).

articles.title: Media Management
articles.question: How do I manage images and files?
articles.answer_text: Media Library stores all uploads. Drag & drop or click to upload. Organize with folders. Images auto-optimized. Built-in editor for cropping. Unsplash integration for stock photos. Max 50MB per file.

articles.title: Team Collaboration
articles.question: How can my team collaborate?
articles.answer_text: Invite team via Settings → Team. Roles: Viewer (read), Editor (create/edit), Admin (full access). Leave comments, @mention teammates, see real-time presence, and track changes in activity log.

articles.title: Version Control
articles.question: How does version history work?
articles.answer_text: Every save creates a version. Access history from editor toolbar. Compare versions side-by-side. Restore any version with one click. Retention: Free 7 days, Pro 90 days, Enterprise unlimited.

articles.title: Data Protection
articles.question: How is my data protected?
articles.answer_text: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. SOC 2 Type II certified. Regular security audits. 2FA available. Session timeout. All access logged. GDPR compliant with EU data centers.

articles.title: Two-Factor Authentication
articles.question: How do I set up 2FA?
articles.answer_text: Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication. Choose authenticator app (recommended) or SMS. Scan QR code. Save backup codes securely. Can regenerate codes anytime.

kbCategories.name: Help & Support
kbCategories.description: Get assistance when you need it.

articles.title: Getting Help
articles.question: How do I get help?
articles.answer_text: Multiple options: Ask our AI assistant (try it now!), use in-app chat, email support@example.com, or join community forums. Pro/Enterprise get priority support with 4-hour response time.

articles.title: Troubleshooting
articles.question: Something is not working correctly
articles.answer_text: Try: 1) Hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R), 2) Clear browser cache, 3) Try different browser, 4) Disable extensions. Still having issues? Chat with us and we will help.
